hooks.command: cd backend && ruff format app/ && ruff check app/ --fix --quiet
cd backend && ruff format app/ && ruff check app/ --fix --quiet
cd frontend && npx prettier --write src/ --log-level error && npx eslint src/ --fix --quiet
cd frontend && npx prettier --write src/ --log-level error && npx eslint src/ --fix --quiet

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command' | grep -qE '(rm -rf|git reset --hard|git push --force|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|DELETE FROM|DETACH DELETE|MERGE \(|CREATE \()'; then echo 'Blocked: destructive or write operation' >&2; exit 2; fi
